privileged_info_summary: The task is to refactor the MRISliceCache class from using a standard HashMap to using LinkedHashMap with LRU (Least Recently Used) eviction policy. The project path is /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/MedicalImagingSystem with target source at src/main/java/com/medsys/imaging/MRISliceCache.java and test at src/test/java/com/medsys/imaging/CacheStabilityTest.java. The maximum cache size must be exactly 20 entries. The task involves a synthetic Maven project where each MRISlice object allocates 5MB of memory to simulate medical imaging data. Tests are run with constrained heap (-Xmx256m) to detect memory leaks. The verifier confirms success by checking Maven test pass (exit code 0), LinkedHashMap usage in the source code, presence of removeEldestEntry override, and verification that cache size limit is 20.
